RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/db2luw/crtbl_schema.bat
RuleSet.Descr: IBM DB/2 LUW create schema tables shell script
RuleSet.GenFile:
@echo off REM REM @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssBatScriptLicense$
$iterate Id16Generators( first invoke_CreateSchemaIdgTableBat each empty empty empty )$$iterate Id32Generators( first invoke_CreateSchemaIdgTableBat each empty empty empty )$$iterate Id64Generators( first invoke_CreateSchemaIdgTableBat each empty empty empty )$$iterate SchemaTables( each invoke_CreateSecTableBat empty empty )$$iterate SchemaTables( each invoke_CreateNonSecTableBat empty empty )$$iterate SchemaTables( each maybe_CreateTableHBat )$
RuleSet.GenRule: $switch TableName Cluster invoke_CreateTableBat Tenant invoke_CreateTableBat SecApp invoke_CreateTableBat SecForm invoke_CreateTableBat SecGroup invoke_CreateTableBat SecGroupForm invoke_CreateTableBat SecGroupInclude invoke_CreateTableBat SecGroupMember invoke_CreateTableBat SecSession invoke_CreateTableBat SecUser invoke_CreateTableBat default empty$

$switch TableName Cluster empty Tenant empty SecApp empty SecForm empty SecGroup empty SecGroupForm empty SecGroupInclude empty SecGroupMember empty SecSession empty SecUser empty default invoke_CreateTableBat$

echo # Running $dbadminfilename_CreateTable$... $BeginCallSqlScriptBat$$dbadminfilename_CreateTable$ $iterate DispensedId16Generators( first invoke_CreateTableIdgTableBat each empty empty empty )$$iterate DispensedId32Generators( first invoke_CreateTableIdgTableBat each empty empty empty )$$iterate DispensedId64Generators( first invoke_CreateTableIdgTableBat each empty empty empty )$
